headline: Japan Could Intervene 30 Times As Yen Defense Enters New Phase
summary: Goldman Sachs (NYSE:GS) analysts have estimated that Japan still has significant firepower to defend the yen after last week's currency-market intervention.  Authorities likely spent about 5 trillion, or $31.3 billion, last Thursday to support the yen after it weakened past 160 against the dollar, according to Goldman economist Yuriko Tanaka.  Goldman estimated that Japan could intervene roughly 30 times at last week's scale, though officials are expected to be careful with their reserves and choose moments when each move could possibly have the strongest impact.

Goldman estimated that Japan could intervene roughly 30 times at last week's scale, though officials are expected to be careful with their reserves and choose moments when each move could possibly have the strongest impact.

headline: OpenAI secures $4 billion for new joint venture with PE giants, Bloomberg reports
summary: Investing.com -- OpenAI has secured more than $4 billion in capital for a new joint venture designed to accelerate the corporate adoption of its artificial intelligence software. The initiative, named The Deployment Company, drew participation from 19 investors including TPG Inc (NASDAQ:TPG), Brookfield Asset Management Inc (NYSE:BAM), Advent, and Bain Capital Specialty Finance Inc (NYSE:BCSF), according to a report from Bloomberg, citing a person familiar with the matter.
